inputs.label: Base Dissociation Constant (Kb)
inputs.businessContext: Equilibrium constant for the base dissociation reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Equilibrium constant for the base dissociation reaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz ayrışma reaksiyonu için denge sabiti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante d'équilibre pour la réaction de dissociation de la base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de equilibrio para la reacción de disociación de la base.

inputs.label: Acid Dissociation Constant (Ka)
inputs.businessContext: Equilibrium constant for the conjugate acid. Used if Kb is not provided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Equilibrium constant for the conjugate acid. Used if Kb is not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konjuge asit için denge sabiti. Kb sağlanmadıysa kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gleichgewichtskonstante für die konjugierte Säure. Wird verwendet, wenn Kb nicht angegeben ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante d'équilibre pour l'acide conjugué. Utilisée si Kb n'est pas fournie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de equilibrio para el ácido conjugado. Se usa si no se proporciona Kb.

inputs.label: pKa
inputs.businessContext: Negative base-10 logarithm of Ka. Used if Kb and Ka are not provided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negative base-10 logarithm of Ka. Used if Kb and Ka are not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ka'nın negatif baz-10 logaritması. Kb ve Ka sağlanmadıysa kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Negativer dekadischer Logarithmus von Ka. Wird verwendet, wenn Kb und Ka nicht angegeben sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Logarithme négatif en base 10 de Ka. Utilisé si Kb et Ka ne sont pas fournis.
businessContext_i18n.es: Logaritmo negativo en base 10 de Ka. Se usa si no se proporcionan Kb y Ka.

inputs.label: Ion Product of Water (Kw)
inputs.businessContext: Self-ionization constant of water at 25°C. Used when deriving Kb from Ka.

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-ionization constant of water at 25°C. Used when deriving Kb from Ka.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 25°C'de suyun kendi kendine iyonlaşma sabiti. Kb'yi Ka'dan türetirken kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Autoprotolysekonstante des Wassers bei 25 °C. Wird verwendet, um Kb aus Ka abzuleiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante d'auto-ionisation de l'eau à 25°C. Utilisée pour dériver Kb à partir de Ka.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de autoionización del agua a 25°C. Se usa al derivar Kb a partir de Ka.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
